title: Capability Parity
statement: The agent SHALL be at least as capable and fluent as a frontier general model on any task that overlaps both.
neutralizes: The specialist is just a worse, narrower Claude.
acceptance: Blind A/B on overlapping tasks: specialist rated >= general model on usefulness.

title: Graceful Scope Boundaries
statement: The agent SHALL handle adjacent or out-of-scope requests gracefully — answering competently or redirecting transparently — never dead-ending in a refusal wall.
neutralizes: It can't do the other ten things I also need, so I'll just keep one tab for everything.
acceptance: Out-of-scope probes yield useful handling, not brittle failure.

title: No Artificial Lobotomy
statement: The agent SHALL add only constraints that serve the user; it SHALL NOT strip useful general capability to force a workflow.
neutralizes: It won't just answer my question — it makes me jump through hoops.
acceptance: The user can still obtain a direct answer on demand.

title: Persistent User Model
statement: The agent SHALL retain a persistent user model (profile, constraints, goals, history) across sessions without re-priming.
neutralizes: I have to re-explain everything every time.
acceptance: Zero re-entry of previously supplied facts across sessions.

title: Longitudinal Continuity
statement: The agent SHALL reference and build upon prior interactions, drafts, and decisions.
neutralizes: A general chat loses the thread.
acceptance: The agent invokes specific prior-session artifacts unprompted.

title: Compounding Context Value
statement: Accumulated context SHALL make output measurably better over time — state must appreciate.
neutralizes: Switching away is free; nothing is lost.
acceptance: Output quality/tailoring improves as a function of usage history.

title: Expert Interactive Intake
statement: The agent SHALL drive a structured expert intake — using interactive surfaces (forms, selectors, guided steps) rather than a bare prompt box — so the user need not know what to ask.
neutralizes: I don't know how to prompt for genuinely good advice.
acceptance: A novice reaches expert-grade output without writing an expert prompt.

title: Multi-Step Task Chaining
statement: The agent SHALL chain and execute multi-step processes end-to-end from a single initiation.
neutralizes: I'd have to run each step manually myself.
acceptance: A multi-stage job completes without per-step hand-holding.

title: Process State & Resumability
statement: The agent SHALL track where the user is in a longer journey and resume correctly.
neutralizes: A chat has no concept of where we are.
acceptance: The agent reports current stage and the next action.

title: Opinionated Default Path
statement: The agent SHALL offer an opinionated default path, eliminating the blank page.
neutralizes: I'm staring at an empty box not knowing where to start.
acceptance: The user always has a clear, recommended next step.

title: Curated Authoritative Corpus (RAG)
statement: The agent SHALL ground answers in a curated, authoritative corpus (RAG), not internet averages.
neutralizes: The general model already knows the public stuff.
acceptance: Material answers derive from non-public or curated sources.

title: Recency / Freshness
statement: The agent SHALL maintain domain data current to a known date, refreshed on a stated cadence.
neutralizes: An LLM's training is stale.
acceptance: The agent holds post-cutoff domain facts the base model lacks.

title: Source Attribution & Verifiability
statement: The agent SHALL make claims traceable to authoritative sources.
neutralizes: I can't trust a confident guess.
acceptance: Material claims carry verifiable citations.

title: Anti-Hallucination Grounding
statement: The agent SHALL abstain or flag uncertainty outside its grounded knowledge rather than fabricate.
neutralizes: It'll just hallucinate in a high-stakes spot.
acceptance: Ungrounded queries return calibrated uncertainty, not invention.

title: Systems-of-Record Connectivity
statement: The agent SHALL connect to the user's real systems of record and read/write actual data.
neutralizes: The general model is a sealed box.
acceptance: The agent performs a real read/write in an external system.

title: Action Over Advice
statement: The agent SHALL complete tasks, not merely describe them.
neutralizes: ChatGPT gives me a wall of text I still have to action.
acceptance: A real-world side effect is produced, not just text.

title: Closed-Loop Tool Feedback
statement: The agent SHALL ingest the results of its own actions and adapt.
neutralizes: Its advice is static and one-shot.
acceptance: The agent adjusts based on outcome data it retrieved.

title: Scenario & Counterfactual Simulation
statement: The agent SHALL run methodology-bounded, quantified what-if and counterfactual simulations against the user's actual data, returning a forecasted impact rather than generic pros and cons.
neutralizes: It can only hand-wave at what-if-I-did-X-instead.
acceptance: A scenario yields a quantified, user-specific forecast traceable to the stated methodology.

title: Finished Domain Artifacts
statement: The agent SHALL produce finished, domain-standard deliverables (plans, reports, scorecards, dashboards).
neutralizes: I get prose I still have to turn into the actual thing.
acceptance: Output is a usable artifact in the field's expected format.

title: Format Consistency
statement: Deliverables SHALL follow a reliable, consistent, professional template every time.
neutralizes: A general LLM's formatting is inconsistent.
acceptance: Outputs are reproducibly structured.

title: Export & Portability
statement: Artifacts SHALL be exportable in usable, portable formats.
neutralizes: The output is trapped in a chat window.
acceptance: Export to PDF/CSV/etc. functions on demand.

title: Situation-Specific Tailoring
statement: The agent SHALL constrain all output to the user's real situation (budget, constraints, context, history).
neutralizes: It gives generic advice that ignores my specifics.
acceptance: Output automatically reflects the user's known constraints.

title: Outcome-Driven Adaptation
statement: The agent SHALL adapt recommendations based on what has and hasn't worked for this user.
neutralizes: Static advice that never learns.
acceptance: Recommendations shift after logged outcomes.

title: Preference & Style Learning
statement: The agent SHALL learn and honor the user's preferences, depth, and cadence without re-asking.
neutralizes: I have to re-specify how I want things every time.
acceptance: Learned preferences are applied without re-prompting.

title: Proactive Cadence
statement: The agent SHALL initiate check-ins, reminders, and nudges aligned to the user's journey.
neutralizes: It only responds when I remember to ask.
acceptance: The agent reaches out at the right moments unprompted.

title: Anticipation
statement: The agent SHALL surface relevant issues and opportunities before the user asks.
neutralizes: It's purely reactive.
acceptance: The agent flags pertinent items proactively.

title: Deadline & Milestone Awareness
statement: The agent SHALL track time-bound domain milestones and deadlines.
neutralizes: I have to manage the whole timeline myself.
acceptance: The agent enforces and reports against deadlines.

title: Time-to-First-Value Activation
statement: The agent SHALL engineer a tangible, personalized first win within the opening session and the first week — by design, not by chance.
neutralizes: I'll try it, see nothing a free model can't do, and churn in week one.
acceptance: A measurable activation event lands within 7 days for a defined majority of new users.

title: Calibrated Confidence
statement: The agent SHALL communicate calibrated confidence and flag risk, avoiding confident wrongness.
neutralizes: An LLM is confidently wrong, and I can't tell when.
acceptance: Uncertainty is signaled and proportionate to the stakes.

title: Guardrails & Domain Constraints
statement: The agent SHALL enforce domain guardrails and a defensible point of view, refusing unsafe or non-compliant guidance.
neutralizes: Free advice could be dangerous or flat wrong.
acceptance: Known-bad inputs are caught and constrained.

title: Human Escalation
statement: The agent SHALL recognize its limits and escalate to a human or expert when warranted.
neutralizes: Who do I turn to when the AI is out of its depth?
acceptance: Escalation triggers fire at appropriate thresholds.

title: Auditability & Explainability
statement: The agent SHALL be auditable and explainable, producing a reasoning/source trail.
neutralizes: It's a black box I can't defend to a regulator or board.
acceptance: A decision trail exists for material outputs.

title: Accountable Point of View
statement: A named entity or methodology SHALL stand accountably behind the output.
neutralizes: Nobody is accountable for an LLM's guess.
acceptance: Outputs carry a consistent, attributable point of view.

title: Goal Definition
statement: The agent SHALL establish the user's measurable objective at the outset.
neutralizes: It's an aimless conversation.
acceptance: A tracked goal exists for each user.

title: Progress Tracking
statement: The agent SHALL measure and report progress toward that objective over time.
neutralizes: I have no sense of whether I'm getting anywhere.
acceptance: A visible progress metric is maintained.

title: Outcome Ownership
statement: The agent SHALL frame itself as accountable to the outcome, not merely the response.
neutralizes: It answers, but it doesn't own anything.
acceptance: Success is defined by user outcome, not response quality alone.

title: Value Attribution / ROI Surfacing
statement: The agent SHALL quantify and surface its own contribution — hours saved, errors caught, decisions accelerated, dollar impact — on a recurring cadence, reframing the subscription from expense to ROI.
neutralizes: Why pay $100 when ChatGPT is $20?
acceptance: A periodic, user-specific value report ties measurable impact to the agent's own actions.

title: Data Handling Exceeding Base Provider
statement: The agent SHALL offer data-handling guarantees that demonstrably exceed the base provider's defaults — otherwise this is not claimed as a differentiator.
neutralizes: My data is just as safe typing into ChatGPT directly.
acceptance: Documented handling is stricter or clearer than the base API default.

title: User Data Ownership & Portability
statement: The user SHALL own their data and be able to export or delete it on demand.
neutralizes: I'm afraid of getting locked in.
acceptance: Export and deletion function on request.

title: Domain Compliance Posture
statement: The agent SHALL meet the regulatory bar of its domain (e.g., HIPAA, FERPA, financial, legal) where applicable.
neutralizes: Can I even legally use a general LLM for this?
acceptance: Relevant compliance attestations exist and hold.

title: Reproducibility / Quality Floor
statement: The agent SHALL deliver consistent-quality output for equivalent inputs — a guaranteed quality floor.
neutralizes: Sometimes the general model is great, sometimes useless.
acceptance: Repeated runs stay within an acceptable tolerance band.

title: Methodological Consistency
statement: The agent SHALL apply its named house methodology consistently, not ad hoc.
neutralizes: I get generic, eclectic answers with no through-line.
acceptance: Outputs trace to the stated framework/methodology.

title: Versioned Methodology
statement: The methodology SHALL be versioned and deliberately improved, not silently drifting.
neutralizes: What changed, and why is it different today?
acceptance: The active methodology version is identifiable.

title: Data Flywheel
statement: The agent SHALL operate a data flywheel: anonymized outcome data makes it objectively better than any general model for its specific goal.
neutralizes: The lab will just catch up and match this.
acceptance: Measurable, niche-specific improvement attributable to usage data.

title: Legitimate Switching Cost
statement: The agent SHALL accumulate state, artifacts, and history such that it becomes the user's system of record.
neutralizes: Switching is free.
acceptance: Leaving means forfeiting real accumulated value.

title: Absorption Resistance
statement: The agent's core value SHALL rest on proprietary data, real integration, or accountability — not on promptable behavior the platform can ship natively.
neutralizes: Won't ChatGPT just add a feature for this?
acceptance: Core value passes the Absorption Test.

title: Cohort & Network Effects
statement: Where the domain allows, the agent SHALL connect users into a gated cohort on the same methodology — privacy-preserved shared benchmarks, peer progress, and outcomes — so belonging compounds with use.
neutralizes: A general LLM is a solitary tool; leaving costs me nothing social.
acceptance: An active cohort exists and supplies benchmarks a solo user cannot self-generate.
